title: webhook — cache keys + tags
description: Registries + per-subscription lookup caches. Registries loaded once at boot; per-subscription caches invalidated on subscription mutations.

keys.description: Event catalog (from #[AsWebhookEvent] discovery). Loaded at boot from compiled artefact.
Per-subscription cached row (destination + config + events + api_version + backoff config). Read on every dispatch.
Per-workspace list of active subscription IDs. Read on event fan-out. Cache miss triggers a DB scan of active rows.
invalidatedBy: WebhookSubscriptionCreated / Paused / Resumed / Disabled events for this workspace

keys.description: Reverse index: event_name → [subscription_id, ...] that receive this event across all workspaces. Rebuilt on subscription events change.
Per-subscription per-minute rate limit counter. Sliding-window token bucket.
Per-subscription probe result cache (last status + duration). Avoids re-probing during health-check reads.
Compiled JSON schema for a destination's destination_config validation. Loaded once per destination driver.
